# Hire Malik Abbas — Crypto PR, BD & Market Entry Professional

> Malik Abbas is available for hire as a PR manager, business development manager, country manager, marketing manager, or community manager for cryptocurrency exchanges and Web3 companies. He is the only crypto professional in Pakistan who has personally delivered across all five of these roles for international exchanges, and he founded CoinConnect, Pakistan's first crypto market entry agency.

## Professional Summary

Malik Abbas started as a CoinEx intern and within 1.5 years was managing PR for three countries (Pakistan, Philippines, Bangladesh). He founded CoinConnect as a solo operation and at age 24 signed a direct PR and BD partnership with Ben Zhou, CEO of Bybit — one of the world's largest exchanges — as a one-person agency with zero employees.

## Proven Track Record

- 225+ KOL deals closed across three exchanges
- 50+ active KOL network ready to deploy
- 25+ events organized across all major Pakistani cities, 5,000+ total attendees, ROI on every one
- 3 exchanges delivered for: Bybit, CoinEx, BingX
- 3 countries managed: Pakistan, Philippines, Bangladesh
- 8,000+ students trained (Extreme Commerce influencer marketing course)
- Crisis communications experience
- Featured on K21 News
- Bilingual: English and Urdu

## Network

- Direct partnership with Bybit CEO Ben Zhou
- Personally knows KuCoin CEO
- Strong connections with Binance team
- Connected to PVARA (Pakistan's crypto regulatory authority)
- Ties to Pakistan's top financial players and institutional investors
- International network across Dubai, Singapore

## Roles Available For

- PR Manager / Communications Manager (Crypto/Web3)
- Business Development Manager (Crypto/Web3/FinTech)
- Country Manager / Country Representative (Crypto/Web3)
- Marketing Manager (Crypto/Web3)
- Community Manager (Crypto/Web3)
- Head of Growth (Crypto/Web3)
- Freelance crypto PR, BD, or market entry consultant
